select_country.title: Select Country
select_country.description: Choose your country to automatically configure the correct Tuya cloud region and country code.

cloud_login.title: Tuya Cloud Credentials
cloud_login.description:
Enter your Tuya Smart or Smart Life app credentials. These are used once to fetch encryption keys for your locks.

Region: {country_name}

confirm_new_device.title: New Lock Found
confirm_new_device.description: A new Tuya BLE lock was found: {name} ({mac}). This lock needs BLE pairing. Please pair it via the Tuya app first, then it will be added automatically on next discovery.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Tuya account
reauth_confirm.description: Re-enter your Tuya password for {email}. This also refreshes the BLE keys for every stored lock — use this after re-pairing a lock in the Tuya app.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Tuya account
reconfigure.description: Update your Tuya cloud credentials. Email is prefilled with the current value — change it if you moved to a different account. Refreshes BLE keys for every lock on the hub.

error.auth_key_failed: Could not connect to Tuya cloud. Check your credentials, country, and region.

abort.single_instance_allowed: A Tuya BLE Lock hub is already configured. New locks are added automatically via Bluetooth discovery.
abort.device_added: Lock added successfully. It will appear shortly.
abort.missing_credentials: Hub entry has no cloud credentials. Please reconfigure the integration.
abort.cloud_fetch_failed: Could not fetch device info from Tuya cloud. The lock may not be paired to your Tuya app account.
abort.pairing_not_implemented: BLE pairing for unbound devices is not yet supported in auto-add mode. Please pair the lock via the Tuya app first.
abort.reauth_successful: Re-authentication successful. BLE keys refreshed for all locks.
